name: ICICI Bank HPCL Coral Credit Card
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions up to Rs 4,000 at HPCL petrol pumps
25% discount on BookMyShow movie tickets (minimum 2 tickets), capped at Rs 100 twice a month
At least 15% off at participating restaurants through ICICI Bank Culinary Treats Programme
additionalDetails: Minimum fuel transaction of Rs 500 required to earn 2.5% cashback at HPCL pumps
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank HPCL Coral product page and third-party verified sources.
Joining fee and Annual fee are Rs 199 each. Annual fee is waived on spending Rs 50,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.
Earns 2.5% cashback on fuel purchases at HPCL pumps (minimum transaction of Rs 500).
Earns 2 Reward Points per Rs 100 spent on retail purchases excluding fuel (0.5% return value).
1% fuel surcharge waiver applies on fuel transactions up to Rs 4,000 at HPCL petrol pumps.
From February 5, 2024, rent payments and e-wallet loading transactions do not earn reward points.
No domestic or international lounge access on this card.
Reward points transferable to Air India Maharaja Club at 6:1 ratio.
